form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr5) over 2040m at Redcliffe beaten 4 m by Lochinvar Jewells (2:30.30) in 3yo+ NR 45 to 52 on April 1 at $23. Before that, 6th (Sr1) over 2040m at Redcliffe, beaten 9 m by So Many Moments (2:30.50) in 3yo+ NR 47 to 54 on March 25 at $7.50. Draws the pegs so expect a better effort.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into third behind Miss Froufrou at this track over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR up to 65 on March 30 at $5.50. Performed better the start before where he won by 8 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr3) at Redcliffe (2:28.90) beating Two Ticks in 2-3yo+ wins on March 19 at $1.40. Go well.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after a week. Lacklustre first-up performance when 10th (Fr7) over 1660m after being wide early at this track beaten 70 m by Oakley Shard (1:55.90) in 3yo+ NR 49 to 55 on March 31 at $101. Not keen on his chances in this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait in score up losing all competitive chance.
Broke in the score up and out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 3 m finishing third after being driven well back, behind Major Crunch at this track over 2138m in a 3yo+ NR 48 to 55 on March 24 at $6.50. Then a handy effort when a close third behind Oakley Shard at this track over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR 49 to 55 on March 31 at $5.50. Will be right in the thick of things.

form.formComment: Returns after three-and-a-half months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into sixth behind Indasky at Parkes over 2040m in a NR up to 55 on December 31 at $2. Rates highly. Should be ready to run well.

Then a handy effort when a close second after showing early speed, behind Much Bettor at this track over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR 51 to 57 on March 27 at $3.80. Genuine threat.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at Penrith over 1720m NR up to 58 M on January 22. Last time out 8th (Sr1) over 1660m at this track beaten 13 m by Mardibringsaparty (1:56.60) in 4yo+ NR 50 or better M on March 7 at $6. Capable of more than she has shown recently. Can do much better this time.
